summary: A Go-based CLI/server tool that detects, runs, and reports on schema assertions with plugin support and Kubernetes integration.
concerns: AI-generated session artifacts (.claude, GOrchestra) cluttering the repository
Uncommitted changes in the working directory
Heavy reliance on test files to understand core logic indicates possible lack of inline documentation
suggestions: Add .claude and GOrchestra/sessions to .gitignore to keep the repo clean
Commit or stash the current working directory changes
Add package and exported function documentation
Focus on understanding the runner and assertion packages as they appear to be the core domain
